message:
fix(a11y): gate DeliverableTreeViz hover:scale on prefers-reduced-motion

Tree-item and spotlight-card scale transforms were unconditionally
applied, violating WCAG prefers-reduced-motion. Other vizzes (IntakePhasesViz,
InstallFlowViz) already guarded this — align DeliverableTreeViz to match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
